ticket.subject: Cannot sign in after password reset
ticket.body: The reset link worked, but now every login attempt says my account is locked. I need access before payroll closes today.

ticket.subject: Charged twice for April invoice
ticket.body: Our card was billed twice for the same April subscription invoice. Please reverse the duplicate charge.

ticket.subject: Data export includes another customer's email
ticket.body: When I exported users, the CSV included an email address from a company I do not recognize.

ticket.subject: Please add dark mode
ticket.body: The product works, but our team would like a dark mode option for late-night use.
